name: taskflow
description: Declarative, verifiable DAG orchestration for Codex subagents — fan-out, gates, loops, tournaments, approvals, resumable runs, and saveable commands, with intermediate transcripts kept out of your context.

interface.longDescription: Use Taskflow to orchestrate multi-phase subagent work as a declarative DAG: fan out over many items, route conditionally, guard quality with gates, and iterate with loops and tournaments — while intermediate transcripts stay in the runtime and only the final result returns to your context.
defaultPrompt: Orchestrate a multi-phase subagent workflow: discover the items, work them in parallel, cross-check with a gate, and report.
